## **2.3.3 ATCO Planning 1**

### **Additional comments**

All ATCOs are working in OPS during the summer season.

### **Additional comments**

All new ATCOs obtained their licence (finised OJT) only at the end of the year, so less ATCOs were available during the summer season.

### **Description of the training process, including details on the effective failure rate and the process used to allocate newly qualified ATCOs between ACC, APP and TWR positions**

One trainee failed training before entering OJT phase, all new ATCOs allocated to ACC.
